notes: Fusion ranking uses cross-sectional z-scored model outputs with rolling-IC weights.
Positive regime scalars do not change cross-sectional ranks; they are preserved for auditability.
Dry-run mode writes a report but does not place trades or persist audit rows.

Maintain a diversified minimum number of holdings.
Run a simple market shock stress test without modifying weights.
